arts.ttl: Panathinaikos vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Thursday's hosts, who sit sixth in the Greek top flight this season, started their campaign with a 1-1 draw at Bosnian side Borac on Matchday 1, while Chelsea topped Gent 4-2 in west London. His team have slipped to sixth in the Premier League, but there's a continental adventure to mitigate before Newcastle United visit Stamford Bridge this weekend.

arts.ttl: 'When I left': Joao Felix shares what he told his friends after 2023 Chelsea exit
arts.sum: This is now his second spell with the club.

arts.ttl: Chelsea have already completed two transfers to give Noni Madueke and Mykhailo Mudryk a problem
arts.sum: Speaking to football.london, Maresca said: "I really like Noni. Between Madueke ’s inconsistent performances and Chelsea ’s unprecedented turnover of players, the Englishman was linked with a move away from Stamford Bridge this summer.

arts.ttl: 'I don't know': Enzo Maresca says he's not sure when £100k-a-week Chelsea star will fulfil his potential
arts.sum: 'Hopefully he gets better day by day with us.'

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal & Chelsea closely monitoring winger, transfer can be triggered for €100m
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are among the numerous top clubs closely monitoring highly-rated Sporting Lisbon wonderkid Geovany Quenda, who could already cost as much as €100m. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that scouts from the likes of Arsenal, Chelsea, Manchester City and Manchester United have been sending their scouts to […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal & Chelsea closely monitoring winger, transfer can be triggered for €100m appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea injuries, Acheampong contract and Mudryk challenge
arts.sum: "Many years ago, the feeling is a little bit mixed in terms of the season I spent here in Greece, for me it was very good with Olympiacos, big rival with Panathinaikos but at the same time I was here in Greece, unfortunately I lost a friend on the pitch when I was at Seville and the first game we played after that, we were already here in Athens, just in that day, one of our teammates passed away in Antonio Puerta. "The only thing is that we have Joao, but we also have more players that are unfortunately not playing but not because they are not doing well during the week.

arts.ttl: 5 Panathinaikos stars Chelsea should watch out for in Conference League
arts.sum: Chelsea fans may already be familiar with 22-year-old Pellistri, who was on the books at United for four years and made 25 appearances for the Red Devils. A smart pick-up on a free transfer, Nemanja Maksimovic ended a seven-year stay in Spain's top flight to join Panathinaikos this summer, immediately injecting some experience in midfield.

The depth of Enzo Maresca's squad will allow the Italian to make wholesale changes from his Premier League XI without sacrificing too much quality in midweek. It's time for the Chelsea B team to shine on Thursday evening as the Blues take on Panathinaikos in the Conference League.
